ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PER STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED 5/21/13, JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT JONATHAN BRADLEY VORNHOLT AND IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS; 1.) PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN RAMOS AWARDED $3,000,000 (THREE MILLION DOLLARS); 2.) PLAINTIFF CASEY HOWARD AWARDED $100,000 (ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND DOLLARS); 3.) PLAINTIFF CELESTE WILSON AWARDED $100,000 (ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND DOLLARS); 4.) PLAINTIFF KELSEY HENDERSON AWARDED $100,000 (ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND DOLLARS); 5.) ALL PLAINTIFFS AWARDED INTEREST AT TEN PERCENT (10%) PER ANNUM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFFS KATHLEEN RAMOS, CASEY HOWARD, CELESTE WILSON, AND KELSEY HENDERSON'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR NO. 11332 (302/EHG)
